prompt: A large abstract mosaic image composed entirely of hundreds of small identical teardrop shapes. Each individual teardrop points toward the LEFT — every single one, uniformly and clearly oriented leftward. But the overall mosaic pattern formed by all the teardrops together creates one large dominant shape that unmistakably points toward the RIGHT. The macro shape emerges purely from the density and arrangement of the teardrops — no color difference, no outlines separating the macro shape from the background. Black background, pale silver-white teardrops, clean geometric abstract style, high contrast, extremely detailed. No text, no numbers, no symbols, no watermarks.(1024*1024px)
visual_logic: Hundreds of teardrops each point left. Their collective arrangement forms one large shape pointing right. The individual truth and the group truth are opposite, simultaneous, and both undeniable. What is true of every part is false for the whole.
